title: Januul Council of Elders
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Januul Council of Elders''' was the ruling group of the [[Januul]] overclan of the [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] [[Alwari]]. After peace was established with the [[Borokii]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] it became a part of the [[Council of Alwari Elders]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]''
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]]

[[Category:Legislatures]]
